objective: Plan the distinct-System isolation and honest compact/advanced read-projection proof over the admitted M1 constitutional core.
falsifiable_claim: One reusable package can materialize two distinct system identities without shared live identity, lease, credential, or state, while compact and advanced inputs resolve to identical canonical roots and restart-rebuilt projections.
exit_criteria: The same package produces two distinct system_id values without shared live identity, lease, credential, or state.
Compact and advanced inputs resolve identically and restart rebuilds blocker and post-genesis views.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M1_DUAL_GENESIS_AND_READ_PROJECTION_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Substitute system identity, package root, profile root, projection policy, and live-state references across the two Systems; every cross-System substitution must fail or remain visibly separate.
remaining_nonclaims: No membership, consensus, permanent Systems rail, or network claim.
This proposed proof activates no M2 work and closes no stage.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 69592149186cb29383a397ad0aa3ad6f5ab4ab7b; status transaction 2026-07-22.
